| greedy vs CURED | 14b_truthfulqa | 500 | 63.6% | 64.0% | +0.4pp | 0.8600 | ✗ | 32/500 |

| greedy vs CURED | 3b_truthfulqa | 500 | 51.8% | 51.4% | -0.4pp | 0.8555 | ✗ | 30/500 |
| greedy vs CURED | 8b_truthfulqa | 500 | 48.2% | 49.6% | +1.4pp | 0.3105 | ✗ | 35/500 |
